title: clauderig config
description: Configuration for clauderig (~/.clauderig/config.json): the sync remote, per-machine path maps, sync roots, and retention.

remote.description: The git remote sync pushes to / pulls from.

machines.description: Per-machine path identities, keyed by machine id.

roots.description: Sync roots and their per-OS locations.

location.description: A cascade of portable templates resolved against a machine's home/OS.

perOS.description: Maps an OS token (macos/windows/linux) to a literal path.

portable.description: A token-bearing path used when no per-OS literal exists.

retention.description: Project-history window and history-branch squash policy.

squashFactor.description: Squash the history branch when its footprint exceeds this × the retained working-tree size.

floorBytes.description: Never squash below this byte floor.

alwaysPrune.description: Makes `restore` prune stale config files (deleted upstream) by default.

autoRestore.description: Makes the SessionStart hook also restore on a fresh machine (auto-wiring a new computer).
